tools.name: getV01Servers
tools.description: List MCP servers - Returns a list of all registered MCP servers

tools.name: getV01ServersServerNameVersions
tools.description: List all versions of an MCP server - Returns all available versions for a specific MCP server, ordered by publication date (newest first)

tools.name: getV01ServersServerNameVersionsVersion
tools.description: Get specific MCP server version - Returns detailed information about a specific version of an MCP server. Use the special version `latest` to get the latest version.
